title: No Pain No Gain
description: Test your understanding of the video and practise useful gym vocabulary, fitness expressions and action verbs.

questions.question: What does “motivated” mean?
options: Ready and excited to do something
questions.answer: Ready and excited to do something
questions.explanation: Sune walks into the gym fully motivated, which means he feels ready and excited.

questions.question: What are “machines” in a gym?
options: Exercise equipment you use to train
People who work at the gym
questions.answer: Exercise equipment you use to train
questions.explanation: Sune looks around at the gym machines but does not know what they do.

questions.question: What does “completely lost” mean in the video?
options: Very confused and unsure what to do
questions.answer: Very confused and unsure what to do
questions.explanation: Sune is completely lost because he does not understand the gym machines.

questions.question: What does “go big” mean?
options: To try something ambitious or difficult
questions.answer: To try something ambitious or difficult
questions.explanation: Sune decides to go big and chooses the heaviest barbell he can find.

questions.question: What is a “barbell”?
options: A long metal bar with weights on it
questions.answer: A long metal bar with weights on it
questions.explanation: Sune grabs the heaviest barbell he can find.

questions.question: What does “out of sync” mean?
options: Not matching the timing or rhythm
questions.answer: Not matching the timing or rhythm
questions.explanation: Sune is out of sync in spin class because he does not match the rhythm of everyone else.

questions.question: What does “drenched” mean?
questions.explanation: Sune is drenched in sweat, which means he is completely soaked.

questions.question: What does “chug” mean?
options: To drink very quickly in big gulps
questions.answer: To drink very quickly in big gulps
questions.explanation: Sune chugs his water bottle because he drinks it very quickly.

questions.question: What does “stiff” mean?
options: Muscles are tight and sore, making it hard to move
questions.answer: Muscles are tight and sore, making it hard to move
questions.explanation: The next day, Sune is so stiff that he can barely walk.

sections.title: Video comprehension
sections.instructions: Answer the questions about the story.

questions.question: Where does Sune go at the beginning of the video?
questions.explanation: At the beginning, Sune walks into the gym with a brand new bag.

questions.question: Why is Sune confused at the gym?
options: He cannot find his water bottle
He does not know what many of the machines do
He is looking for the exit
questions.answer: He does not know what many of the machines do
questions.explanation: Sune looks around at the machines and has no idea what half of them do.

questions.question: What mistake does Sune make with the barbell?
options: He chooses the heaviest one he can find
He hides it under his bag
questions.answer: He chooses the heaviest one he can find
questions.explanation: Sune decides to go big and grabs the heaviest barbell, which is a big mistake.

questions.question: What happens in spin class?
options: Sune is perfectly in sync with everyone
Sune falls asleep on the bike
Sune is completely out of sync with everyone else
questions.answer: Sune is completely out of sync with everyone else
questions.explanation: During spin class, Sune cannot match the rhythm of the group.

questions.question: What happens to Sune the next day?
questions.explanation: The next day, Sune is so stiff that he can barely walk.

sections.title: Complete the sentence
sections.instructions: Choose the correct word or expression.

questions.question: In the dance class, I was completely ______ with everyone else.
questions.explanation: To be out of sync means to not match the timing or rhythm of others.

questions.question: After running for an hour, I was ______ in sweat.
questions.explanation: To be drenched means to be completely soaked, usually with sweat or water.

questions.question: He was so thirsty that he ______ his water bottle.
questions.explanation: To chug means to drink something very quickly in big gulps.
